hints: Verbo: estar (auxiliar para expresar acción en progreso)

spanishSentence: Ellos estaban construyendo una nueva arquitectura de microservicios cuando el cliente solicitó características adicionales.
correctSentence: They were building a new microservices architecture when the client requested additional features.

hints: Verbo: estar (imperfecto, indicando acción en progreso)

correctSentence: We were building a new microservices architecture when the deployment pipeline failed.

hints: Complemento: Una nueva arquitectura de microservicios

correctSentence: The architect was proposing a new microservices architecture when the team interrupted the meeting.

hints: Complemento: obtener datos de la API
